heading: Omitted
label: 702 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which related to execution of patents, deeds, and other instruments by the Secretary of the Interior, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 733, § 1268 Stat. 727
